title: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES - 211info
text: LA GRANDE VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists individuals with disabilities in finding and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. Services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and support for independent living. Services are provided in partnership with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 1607 Gekeler Lane La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (541) 963-2151 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 963-2151 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Documentation regarding disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Union County Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Vocational Rehabilitation Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA GRANDE VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION
